embeds.title: 🎮 Nintendo Switch Emulators
embeds.description: Play Switch games on PC. The original **Ryujinx** and **Yuzu** were discontinued in 2024 — these are the actively-maintained community forks to use in 2026.

fields.name: ✅ Ryubing  —  Best for PC  ·  Recommended
fields.value:
Carries on the Ryujinx lineage — rock-solid **accuracy & stability** with fewer graphical glitches. Includes self-hosted **LDN** so you can join public or password-protected local-wireless lobbies.
**Platforms:** Windows · Linux · macOS
➜ [**Download**](https://ryujinx.app/)  ·  [GitHub](https://github.com/Ryubing)

fields.name: 🌙 Eden  —  Best All-Rounder
fields.value:
The most actively-developed Yuzu-based fork. Excellent **performance** and the widest game compatibility — Android-first, but runs great on PC too.
**Platforms:** Windows · Linux · Android
➜ [**Download**](https://git.eden-emu.dev/eden-emu/eden/releases)

fields.name: 🐱 Citron  —  Simple & Cross-Platform
fields.value:
Works well on both PC and phone with an easy setup and a built-in mod downloader. A safe one-emulator-does-everything pick.
**Platforms:** Windows · Linux · Android
➜ [**Download**](https://citron-emu.org/)

fields.name: 📋 Before You Start
fields.value: Every Switch emulator needs **firmware** + **`prod.keys`** dumped from a Switch you own, plus your own game dumps. Follow each emulator's setup guide for the exact steps.
